channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Forest Bike, 20th May
item.description:
Forest bike abandoned on pavement, restricting access for members of public

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tennyson Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Other tree issue problem has been found, 20th May
item.description:
Fallen branch - reported on behalf of colleagues

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Fitzroy Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 20th May
item.description:
Been split by foxes and now everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Plastic and plywood, 20th May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped - second lot in 4 days in this spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bush Hill, Southgate

item.title: Glengall road, 20th May
item.description:
Street needs sweeping
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London

item.title: Dead fox in the road, 20th May
item.description:
There is a dead fox in the middle of the road, could cause problems while people avoid it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 503, Footscray Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sweepers bags, 20th May
item.description:
One has been there a week or more recently been joined by a friend

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunlace Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double red lines have faded, 20th May
item.description:
The double red lines have faded dramatically. This leads to people parking where they should not, exposing them to tickets and blocking up the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Gunter Grove, Brompton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside of 87 and 85 Avenue Road, NW8 6JD, 20th May
item.description:
Three access boxes weren’t completed properly that there is no tarmac on top which cause pounding disturbance noises when cars go through. It disturbs the living and sleeping qualities for the residency nearby. It also cause disturbance for school nearby as well. Pls arrange immediate attention to have the problem resolved.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 87, Avenue Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish tipped outside Buttefield Green, 20th May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish, 20th May
item.description:
More household rubbish being dumped on the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longville Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 20th May
item.description:
There is death fox on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Sherwood Close, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste, 20th May
item.description:
Every day something new! Now bags of garden waste dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evergreen Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste on Astbury road, 20th May
item.description:
There is continuing problem with food waste and packages scattered on Astbury road , partly distributed further from the main road either by foxes or wind. It is most likely to be generated by either driver who park the car to snack or pedestrians eating take away. I do periodically remove cans and packages but I can’t be cleaning the whole of the street !! Can something be done ?!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Astbury Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 20th May
item.description:
Rubbish all over Wilton road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mcleod Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven road surface, 20th May
item.description:
Severe bump in the road which is causing traffic to swerve into incoming traffic on opposite side of the road to avoid it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wandsworth Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost loose cover exposed wiring, 20th May
item.description:
Open and dangerous

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footpath From Comberton Road To Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Continuing problem with litter on the street, 20th May
item.description:
Due to inadequate bin provision people are leaving rubbish out in plastic bags that the foxes the rip open. On a daily basis the rubbish is strewn over the footpath and roadside kerb from the corner of wescombe park road up to the bus stop outside the pharmacy.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole at the traffic lights, 20th May
item.description:
Large pothole in centre of road as you pass through the traffic lights
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 413, Wandsworth Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas canisters on grass verge, 20th May
item.description:
A box of gas canisters have been dumped with an Amazon box (maybe there’s an address that could be used for prosecution??) on the grass verge just after the donation bins on station road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monarch Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
